description: Per-file scan tombstones (v0.3 M5; DD-103, FR-TOMBSTONE-1). Written to .claude/coherence/scan-cache/tombstones.json by src/scanner/scanCacheTombstone.ts. Path-keyed (normalised) dictionary with mtime + content fences; LRU at 5,000 entries. The file is plugin-managed and best-effort; missing or unreadable contents are treated as an empty cache. No schema_version is persisted — the file format is owned by the writer module and tracks the v3 plugin sentinel implicitly.

entries.description: Map of normalised-path → TombstoneEntry. Normalisation: backslashes → forward slashes; lowercase on win32/darwin; leading './' and '/' stripped.

path_hash.description: 12-hex SHA-256 of the normalised path. Privacy-safe key for telemetry.

content_hash.description: 12-hex SHA-256 of the file body at the time of insertion.

git_mtime.description: ISO8601 mtime captured at insertion. Eviction predicate: if stat() shows current mtime > recorded git_mtime, the entry is invalid.

inserted_at.description: ISO8601 wall-clock at insertion. LRU ordering key.

expires_at.description: Optional explicit expiry. Used by the trickle scanner to age out tombstones for files that haven't been visited in a long time.
